title: balah #1086
definition:
1) to wear out, become old
    1a) (Qal) to wear out
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to wear out
        1b2) to wear out by use, use up completely
        1b3) to enjoy, use to the full
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to wear out
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to wear out
        1b2) to wear out by use, use up completely
        1b3) to enjoy, use to the full

    NASB:  to become old, wear out
